case_title: MOSCOSO, MARIA CONCEPCION et al VS ROCHA, RUBEN

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24897, RECORD TRANSFERRED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOSCOSO, MARIA CONCEPCION ANDINO, EDDY FERNANDO (MINOR) AS TO DEFENDANT ROCHA, RUBEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
REM: PETITION OF MINOR PLNTF. FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN, FILED IN COURT; IS GRANTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-15-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-13-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSCOSO, MARIA CONCEPCION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROCHA, RUBEN JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24897 ON 2-13-97. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT SENT TO RUBEN ROCHA RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSCOSO, MARIA CONCEPCION ANDINO, EDDY FERNANDO (MINOR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCHA, RUBEN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,521.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ROCHA, RUBEN
